title: FreshBooks vs Square
description: Compare FreshBooks vs Square in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right finance & accounting tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, FreshBooks emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, FreshBooks or Square?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, FreshBooks edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating. FreshBooks excels at FreshBooks is cloud accounting software purpose-built for self-employed professi, while Square is stronger for Square is a finance & accounting platform that helps Small Businesses and Retail.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between FreshBooks and Square?
faqs.answer: FreshBooks and Square differ in pricing ($17–$55/mo vs Free – $79/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is FreshBooks cheaper than Square?
faqs.answer: FreshBooks starts at $17–$55/mo while Square starts at Free – $79/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, FreshBooks or Square?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for finance & accounting. FreshBooks scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use FreshBooks and Square together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, FreshBooks or Square?
faqs.answer: Both FreshBooks and Square prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which finance & accounting tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Square for large teams, while FreshBooks may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $17–$55/mo pricing.
